title: The 5 Best Cloud Computing Stocks to Buy for 2023
text: Last year was terrible for some of the best cloud computing stocks, and for the Cloud Czars whose cash flow built it. Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL ), Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT ), Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL , GOOG ), Amazon.Com (NASDAQ: AMZN ), and Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META ) combined to lose trillions of dollars in market cap.

title: PTC to Announce Fiscal Q1'23 Results on Wednesday, February 1st, 2023
text: BOSTON , Jan. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (Nasdaq: PTC) will release its fiscal 2023 first quarter results on Wednesday, February 1 st after the stock market closes. Senior management will host a live webcast and conference call to review the results on Wednesday, February 1 st at 5pm Eastern Time.

title: Stock Based Compensation: The Dilution Potential Of The Worst Offenders
text: Stock based compensation or SBC for short has been a focus of many lately given the egregious numbers posted quarter-after-quarter in financial results. The point of all this investor anxiety towards SBC is the resulting devastating dilution that may occur if the billions in options are actually exercised.

title: PTC Completes Acquisition of FSM Software Company ServiceMax
text: PTC's acquisition of ServiceMax is expected to boost its portfolio of PLM solutions and complement company's digital thread portfolio.

title: PTC Completes Acquisition of ServiceMax
text: Acquisition expands service capabilities of PTC's closed-loop PLM portfolio BOSTON , Jan. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC  (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced that it has completed its acquisition of ServiceMax from an entity majority owned by Silver Lake. The acquisition adds important field service management (FSM) capabilities to PTC's closed-loop product lifecycle management (PLM) and digital thread offerings.
